# Pull Request

## Summary

- Describe the change.

## Scope

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Content/schema tooling
- [ ] Locale-aware routing or language switching
- [ ] CI, smoke checks, or maintainer workflow
- [ ] Demo UI
- [ ] Other:

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm run verify`
- [ ] I included any relevant manual smoke-check notes.
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed.

## OSS Boundary Check

- [ ] No private brand names, production domains, or commercial paths were added.
- [ ] No secrets, live cloud bindings, or real analytics snapshots were added.
- [ ] Example data is synthetic or intentionally public.
- [ ] The change remains reusable for bilingual Astro knowledge sites.
